reasoning: Without specific search tools available to check 2025 streaming data up to October, I am relying on base rates. Historically, Bad Bunny was the #1 Spotify artist for three consecutive years (2020-2022) before being displaced by Taylor Swift in 2023. Given the global dominance of peers like Swift, The Weeknd, and Drake, achieving the #1 spot is highly dependent on releasing a massive album during the year. As a single competitor among ~4 heavyweights, a typical base rate would be around 15-20%. Without confirmation of his performance in 2025, a probability of 13% correctly weights his historical success against the strength of the rest of the field.
